text.message: you guys trading wheat or no?
oj has 4 devs and we're the block?
hey oj, if you have a knight, might wanna agro the 9 wood.

so don't really wanna do 1-1 with you now

you want to settle to get a point for yourself
you can't block red from settling
count how many settle spots they have
so they don't care if you take 10-5.
but for you to win, you really need it
you gotta have at least 1 vp, right?
had to happen sometime :)  only so many cards in the deck
